{{Quote|We're waiting for the signal from my operative on the space station. Then we'll microjump into position. He'll tell us the moment ''Helot's Shackle'' undocks from the Ylesian space station. We want to catch the slavers before they can leave the system.|[[Bria Tharen]]|<ref name="RD">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Emancipator''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the early months of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Originally, it was called '''''Helot's Shackle''''' and was a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] ship that had operated out of [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] escaped from the planet along with [[Bria Tharen]], they narrowly avoided being captured and boarded by the orbiting ship.<ref name="TCSWE" />

Nine years later, Tharen had founded [[Red Hand Squadron]] as part of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to free slaves around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. She masterminded an elaborate plan to hijack ''Helot's Shackle'' and free the [[Exultation]]-addicted slaves who were bound for either [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] or various [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pleasure houses. Despite heavy losses and intense fighting, Red Hand Squadron prevailed and [[Capture of the Helot's Shackle|captured]] the ship. She renamed the ship ''Emancipator'' in homage to freeing the slaves.

The newly commissioned Rebel vessel participated in the [[Battle of Ylesia]], where Bria Tharen freed all the pilgrims from the spice factories and the [[t'landa Til]] [[Exultation]].

==Behind the scenes==
There is a scene in ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' where Bria Tharen is talking to her superior officer about renaming the ''Emancipator''. The captured corvette is later referred to as ''Retribution''. This seems to be either an editorial or writer error, since the [[Retribution (Marauder-class)|''Retribution'']] was Bria Tharen's [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]]. Although the ''Helot's Shackle''{{'s}} new name is only mentioned twice (once as ''Emancipator'', once as ''Retribution''), it was likely an editorial mistake to call it ''Retribution''.
